rationale: Both correctly diagnose the base/instruct config mismatch, cite the same crashing lines in hunyuan_image3.py, give the working DiT-config workaround, and correctly note the maintainer's ask to track the guard/docs fix in a new issue. Y is more thorough and actionable: it explains why the two YAMLs differ topologically, supplies an actual tolerant-code patch instead of just describing a guard, and explicitly flags the hardware limitation caveat, though some of its file-header claims are unverifiable specifics. X is accurate but more repetitive (draft + duplicated additional_context) and introduces an unverified third config (hunyuan_image3_ar.yaml) not in the thread.
